caption: A split-screen display features a close-up of a sports collectible on the left and a man in a recording studio on the right. The collectible is a commemorative card for "KIRBY PUCKETT" of the "MINNESOTA TWINS®," featuring a signature and text describing a "RIVERBOAT" World Series opening on "OCTOBER 17, 1987" where the Twins defeated the St. Louis Cardinals. The card is marked "ONE — OF — ONE" and "TOPPS CERTIFIED CUT SIGNATURE." Overlaid on the image is the "JASPY S LIVE" logo and "CASEBREAKS.COM". To the right, a man with a beard, wearing a dark blue t-shirt, sits at a desk with computer monitors, a microphone, and gaming equipment in a dimly lit room. As the sequence progresses, the man remains seated, looking toward the monitors, while the view of the card remains static.
